keyEvents.text: Substitution, Suriname. Jay-Roy Grot replaces Justin Lonwijk.
Substitution, Suriname. Sheraldo Becker replaces Denzel Jubitana.
Goal! Guatemala 1, Suriname 0. Darwin Lom (Guatemala) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Óscar Santis with a cross.
José Rosales (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Guatemala. Olger Escobar replaces Pedro Altán.
Goal! Guatemala 2, Suriname 0. Olger Escobar (Guatemala) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Rudy Muñoz following a fast break.
Substitution, Suriname. Radinio Balker replaces Ridgeciano Haps.
Substitution, Suriname. Virgil Misidjan replaces Dhoraso Klas.
Goal! Guatemala 3, Suriname 0. Óscar Santis (Guatemala) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Darwin Lom with a headed pass following a fast break.
Substitution, Guatemala. Matt Evans replaces Óscar Santis.
Substitution, Guatemala. Rubio Rubín replaces Darwin Lom.
Substitution, Guatemala. Rodrigo Saravia replaces José Rosales.
Substitution, Guatemala. Jesús López replaces Rudy Muñoz.

Kenneth Paal (Suriname) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
